ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Duodecim Mansionum caelestium Sectio, per Horizontales, positionisque Circulos, Aequatori, eiusq; Parallelis, & inde pro Syderum, locorumq; Caelestium Obviationibus ptolomaei calculo convenjentes Facta. Nec non aptissima ratio excipiendi comprehensum spatium in Aequatore pro annis naturalia metientibus in Homine. Ad Eminentiss. principem S.R.E. Card. Amplissimum D.D. Franciscum Boncompagnum Archiepiscopum Neapolitanum. Ocii Lusus Francisci Nolae Art. Med. Doct. Neapol. In Ociosorum Academia Sterilis.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
